titleStmt.title: SII 35.22: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 22. (A.R. No. 63 of 1950-51.) HIRĒKAṆGI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the debris called Śankarimat6t6i.

This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva is dated Śaka 993, Virōdhikṛit, Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti, Vyatīpāta, Amāvāse. Monday. These details equate with 1071 A.D. December 25. However, the weekday was Sunday.

The record refers to the construction of the temple of Mūlasthāna-Śaṁkara-Kalidēva by Chaṭṭikabbe-gāvuṇḍi and registers a gift of land to the same made by her son Chikka-gāvuṇḍa who was administering the village Piriya-Kaṇṇage, when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Māvakētarasa was administering Pānuṁgal-500 and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Parikantadēva of the Kadamba family was governing Banavāsi-12000 and Pānuṁgal-500. Bammaya, the sēnabōva of Piriya-Kaṇṇage wrote the record and Chaṭṭa, son of Mīrijōja engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
ḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvar pri
thvīrājyaṁ geye . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
ḷēsvaraṁ māvakētarasa pānuṁgallainūṟama mēlāḷkeyanāḷuttami
re . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara bana
vāsipuravarēsvaraṁ tryakṣakṣmāsaṁbhavaṁ Ajjādēvivaraprasādaṁ kā
daṁbacakri śrīmatuparikantadēvaṁ banavāsipanni¨rccāsiramumaṁ pā
nuṁgalainūṟumaṁ sukharājyaṁ geyye . samastaguṇasaṁpannaṁ nuḍidu
mattennaṁ gaḍigaḷabhīmaṁ mahādēvapādārādhakaṁ baccagolatilaka
cikkagāvuṇḍa piriyakaṇnageya vū¨rggāvuṇḍugeyyuttamire .
Avarabbe samastaguṇasaṁpanne gōtrapavitre mahēśvaradha¨rmma
ni¨rmmaḷe satyanavarate gurupādapaṁkajabhramare śrīsōmēsva
radāsi caṭṭakabbegāvuṇḍi mūlasthānasaṁkarakalidēvasvāmiya
dēvālyamaṁ māḍisi . sakava¨rṣa 993 virōdhikṛtsaṁvatsa
rada Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpāta Amavāse sōmavārada
ndu jī¨rnnoddhāra kaṁḍaspuṭitakaṁ chaṭṭiyabbeya magaṁ cikkagāvuṇḍanuṁ
dēva¨rgge biṭṭa gaddeya mattaru 3 Ida pratipāḷisidaṁge vāraṇā
si kurukṣētradoḷ sāsirakavileyaṁ brāhmaṇara¨rgge [U]bhayamukhi dānaṁge
Idapaḷamaku . Idanaḷidaṁ paṁcamahāpātakanaku . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdarā śaṣṭirva¨rṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . piriyakaṇnageya sēnabōva bamma
ya bareda . kallukuṭṭiga mīrijōjana magaṁ caṭṭa besageIda .
Digital edition of SII 35.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
